Lumify
Table of Contents

Class FoldersController

Namespace
lumify.api.Controllers
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

Manages note folders, both personal (no workspace) and workspace-shared, including creation, editing, moving and recursive deletion. All endpoints require an authenticated user. Changes to workspace folders are pushed live to the workspace group over the NoteHub.

[ApiController]
[Route("folders/[action]")]
[Authorize]
public class FoldersController : ControllerBase
Inheritance
object
ControllerBase
FoldersController

Remarks

Permission rule throughout: a personal folder may only be modified by its owner, while a workspace folder may be modified by any active member of that workspace (see CanModify).

Constructors

FoldersController(ILogger<FoldersController>, LumifyDbContext, IHubContext<NoteHub>)

Creates the controller with its injected logger, database context and the note hub used for live notifications.

public FoldersController(ILogger<FoldersController> logger, LumifyDbContext db, IHubContext<NoteHub> noteHub)

Parameters

logger ILogger<FoldersController>
db LumifyDbContext
noteHub IHubContext<NoteHub>

Methods

AddFolder(AddFolderRequest, CancellationToken)

Creates a new folder, optionally inside a workspace and/or a parent folder.

[HttpPost]
[ActionName("addFolder")]
public Task<ActionResult<FolderResponse>> AddFolder(AddFolderRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request AddFolderRequest

Folder data (name required; optional description, workspace, parent).

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<FolderResponse>>

200 with the created folder; 400 on missing name or invalid workspace/parent; 403 if the user is not a member of the target workspace or owner of the parent.

Remarks

If a workspace is given, the user must be a member of it; if a parent folder is given, it must live in the same space. On success in a workspace, a FolderCreated event is broadcast to the workspace group.

DeleteFolder(string, CancellationToken)

Soft-deletes a folder together with all of its descendant sub-folders and their notes (recursive, breadth-first).

[HttpDelete]
[ActionName("deleteFolder")]
public Task<ActionResult> DeleteFolder(string folderID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

folderID string

The root folder to delete.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult>

200 with success = true and the folder ID; 400 if the ID is missing; 403 if the user may not delete it; 404 if the folder does not exist.

Remarks

Nothing is physically removed — all affected rows get a DeletedAt timestamp. On a workspace folder, a FolderDeleted event is broadcast to the workspace group.

GetAllFoldersOfUser(CancellationToken)

Returns all personal folders of the current user (no workspace), oldest first.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getAllFoldersOfUser")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<FolderResponse>>> GetAllFoldersOfUser(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<FolderResponse>>>

200 with the list of personal folders.

GetAllFoldersOfWorkspace(string, CancellationToken)

Returns all folders of the given workspace, oldest first.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getAllFoldersOfWorkspace")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<FolderResponse>>> GetAllFoldersOfWorkspace(string workspaceID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

workspaceID string

The workspace whose folders are requested.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<FolderResponse>>>

200 with the list of workspace folders.

SaveFolder(SaveFolderRequest, CancellationToken)

Updates a folder's name, description and/or parent (move). Only the provided fields are changed; the database is only written if something actually changed.

[HttpPatch]
[ActionName("saveFolder")]
public Task<ActionResult<FolderResponse>> SaveFolder(SaveFolderRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request SaveFolderRequest

The folder ID plus the fields to change.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<FolderResponse>>

200 with the updated folder; 400 on invalid input or move target; 403 if the user may not modify it; 404 if the folder does not exist.

Remarks

Move rules: a folder cannot be moved into itself; a personal folder may only move into another personal folder of the same owner; a workspace folder may only move within the same workspace. On a successful change in a workspace, a FolderUpdated event is broadcast to the workspace group.
